response.justification: Bogdan has a strong background in geospatial projects (GISCollective) and distributed systems, with experience in low-latency applications and high-performance data processing. However, his expertise in C++ or Rust for routing/navigation systems is not clearly demonstrated, and his recent roles primarily involve TypeScript, Node.js, and Dlang. His lack of recent C++ experience and limited direct exposure to routing-specific challenges (e.g., tile optimization, traffic integration) may pose a risk for this role.
strengths: Extensive experience with geospatial data processing and GIS platforms (GISCollective)
Proven track record in building low-latency, high-performance systems (Dlang, C++ at National Instruments)
Strong problem-solving skills and willingness to learn new technologies (evidenced by career shifts and workshops)
concerns: Limited direct experience with C++ or Rust in a commercial routing/navigation context
Most recent roles focus on TypeScript/Node.js rather than system-level programming
No clear evidence of working with routing-specific challenges (e.g., tile generation, traffic integration)
